title: mentha pagana
intro: Mentha pagana, also known as American peppermint or wild mint, is a perennial herb native to North America. The medicinal properties of Mentha pagana include its ability to soothe digestive issues and alleviate symptoms of nausea and indigestion. The health benefits of Mentha pagana include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce fever and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Mentha pagana can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs like chamomile and lemon balm to create calming and digestive-friendly blends.
